title: Column Validation Rule
excerpt: Hi @Monday.com Team, is there a way to add custom validation rules for individual columns? Can we implement custom validation for each column, or is this feature currently unavailable?

posts.author: abhinav2023 (Abhinav Vashishth)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Monday.com Team, is there a way to add custom validation rules for individual columns? Can we implement custom validation for each column, or is this feature currently unavailable?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: They have Required Fields for some plans. Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @abhinav2023,

Could you provide examples of validation rules you’re looking for?

Is it a validation only based on this specific column (e.g. text can’t be longer than 100 characters) or based on other column (e.g. to change text column the item must be in “In progress” state)?

posts.author: abhinav2023 (Abhinav Vashishth)
posts.cookedHtml: Standard Level, but I don’t want required fields. I want fields that can store custom values with proper validation — for example, numbers within a specific range or text containing only certain allowed characters. This is my requirement.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gotcha, sorry misunderstood. There’s not a way ‘natively’ to do that. Some workaround

Conditional formatting to highlight the row/cell if they put in info that’s not supposed to be there.

Automations to say if number is X then notify you so you can review.

Here’s the link for feature requests if you want to post this there.

Submit your product ideas and feedback, tell us about your dream features, and vote to be heard!
